# omni_user (Data Source)

Looks up an existing Omni user by email.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "omni_user" "alice" {
  email = "alice@example.com"
}

output "alice_role" {
  value = data.omni_user.alice.role
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `email` (String) The email of the user to look up.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The user ID (UUID).
- `role` (String) The role of the user.
